headline: Head of Developer Relations at Cloud Forge
about: Diego helps developer communities adopt cloud platforms through education content workshops and open source examples. He enjoys turning technical product launches into stories that engineers can actually use.

experience.title: Head of Developer Relations
experience.description: Runs the developer advocacy strategy across Europe. Built a field enablement program that supported twelve regional workshops and doubled the newsletter subscriber base in one year.

experience.title: Senior Developer Advocate
experience.description: Published technical tutorials for container security and observability. Open sourced demo apps used by solution architects during customer meetings.

experience.title: Full Stack Engineer
experience.description: Developed SaaS features for engineering analytics dashboards. Worked across backend services frontend delivery and developer tooling.

education.details: Specialized in digital products analytics and communication.
Completed capstone work on collaborative web platforms.

accomplishments: Host of a monthly community livestream for platform engineering teams.
Mentor in an open source newcomers program.
